package rulefixtures

import (
	"crypto/tls"
	grpc "google.golang.org/grpc"
	credentials "google.golang.org/grpc/credentials"
)

// scenario for grpc_without_tls_credentials: `grpc.Dial(addr, grpc.WithInsecure())` or `grpc.WithTransportCredentials(insecure.NewCredentials())` in non-test code
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario714Negative(addr string) (*grpc.ClientConn, error) {
	return grpc.Dial(addr, grpc.WithTransportCredentials(credentials.NewTLS(&tls.Config{MinVersion: tls.VersionTLS13})))
}
